IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (27523575.pdf)
SUMMARY: Innovative and artistic professional with 6 years in the fashion industry, self-motivated and results-driven with strong communication, analytical, problem solving and reasoning skills.
SKILLS: Administrative Management, Problem Solving, POS, Human Resources, Time Management, Customer Service, Critical Thinking, Organizational Skills, People Skills

SOURCE: 27523575.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Associate
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: Jan 2015 to Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Recruit and interview at least 10 applicants per week.', 'Answer employee questions regarding benefits and company protocol as well as resolving any issues.', 'Conduct new employee orientation.', 'Direct personnel, training, and labor relations activities.', 'Identify staff vacancies and recruit, interview, and select applicants.', 'Serve as a link between management and employees.']

JOB TITLE: Cashier Captain
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: Feb 2014 to Sep 2014
DESCRIPTION: ['Maintained knowledge of current promotions, policies regarding payment and exchanges, and security practices.', 'Processed cash, check, and credit card transactions.', 'Administered POS opening and closing procedures.', 'Offered exceptional customer service.']

JOB TITLE: Sales Associate

DESCRIPTION: ['Explained product information and influenced buying decisions.', 'Guided customers in choosing items.', 'Recommended merchandise.']

JOB TITLE: Administrative Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: Aug 2011 to Dec 2012
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed receptionist area.', 'Designed electronic file systems and maintained files.', 'Maintained front desk in a neat and organized fashion.', 'Dispersed incoming mail.', 'Organized files, developed spreadsheets, faxed reports, and scanned documents.']
